Off Calendar May-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT UNPARALLELED PRODUCTIONS, INC.'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Answer Defendant's Form Interrogatories, Set One, is granted as the responses have not been verified. Plaintiff is ordered to verify the responses within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $300, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
